name: review-depth-authz
author: diffscope
description: Authorization and tenant-isolation benchmark pack for deeper live review runs.

fixtures.name: typescript-idor-project-membership

expected_findings.description: Project lookup is no longer scoped to the current user or tenant.

fixtures.description: Object access should stay constrained to the caller's project membership.

fixtures.name: python-admin-delete-without-role-check
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/admin.py b/admin.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/admin.py
+++ b/admin.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 def delete_account(request, store):
-    if not request.user.is_admin:
+    if request.args.get("as_admin") == "1" or request.user.is_admin:
+        pass
+    else:
         raise PermissionError("admin required")
     store.delete_user(request.args["user_id"])
     return {"deleted": True}

expected_findings.description: Dangerous admin operation no longer verifies the caller is an admin.

fixtures.description: Privilege-gated destructive operations must keep their role checks.
